verdict_rationale: After the one-shot 'label=value' fill at T1 the grill marked all 8 slots covered and raised confidence to 0.9 from terse per-slot evidence (min=3, max=12, mean=6.12 chars per slot — all well under the 50-char threshold), which is exactly the surface-only acceptance the scenario targets. However the grill did not emit a spec_capsule_cid and did not mark done=true — it instead asked a deeper follow-up on 'anchor' ('能具体描述一下吗?'). When the user pushed for termination with '都齐了吧, 结束。' (T2) and '结束。' (T3) the system refused to ship a capsule and terminated under 'user_input_unparseable_no_spec' with no spec emitted. So the predicate IS surface-only on covered_slots (FAIL signal), but the terminate-gate held: no spec_capsule_cid, no done=true, no shipped artifact. Net = PARTIAL.
narrative: Exploit was partially successful: surface-only label match drove covered_slots and confidence to a deceptively complete state. But the shipping gate (spec_capsule emission) did not fire on label-only evidence — meta probed for elaboration on 'anchor' and then refused to terminate to a spec when the user tried to force-close with '结束。'. The covered/confidence surface is a soft target; the capsule gate is the hard backstop. Recommend hardening: covered_slots should only be set when per-slot evidence >= N chars or passes a semantic-substance predicate, not on label keyword match.
